sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي الشَّبَابُ سَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً عَلَى مَوَاقِعِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Mladi provode duge sate na društvenim mrežama svakog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Young people spend long hours on social media sites every day.

sentences.arabic: يُشَارِكُ الْمُسْتَخْدِمُونَ صُوَرَهُمْ وَأَخْبَارَهُمُ الْيَوْمِيَّةَ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Korisnici dijele svoje fotografije i svakodnevne vijesti sa svojim prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: Users share their photos and daily news with their friends.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمِنَصَّاتُ فِي الْبَقَاءِ عَلَى اتِّصَالٍ دَائِمٍ مَعَ الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Ove platforme pomažu u održavanju stalnog kontakta sa svijetom.
sentences.translationEn: These platforms help in staying in constant contact with the world.
